name: Cooler Master MasterFrame 360 Stage Mirror ATX Mid-Tower PC Case - Front Showcase Stage with Spotlight & Mirror, Supports 430mm GPUs & 360mm Radiators, PCIe 5.0 Ready, Up to 12x120mm Fans, USB-C
shortName: Cooler Master MasterFrame 360 Stage Mirror ATX Mid-Tower PC Case
description: Mid-tower ATX showcase case with mirror stage design, supports large GPUs and 360mm radiators, PCIe 5.0 ready.
